summary: Complete testing of Kryptobox Dashboard System. Fixed 1 bug in transactions endpoint (response_model mismatch). Backend 27/27 tests passing. All frontend pages and navigation working correctly.

minor.issue: FIXED: response_model=List[dict] but endpoint returned dict with {transactions, total, limit, offset}
passlib warning about bcrypt version - non-blocking cosmetic issue

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard system implemented correctly with proper access control
Non-approved users see 'Pending Approval' message as expected
Admin endpoints properly restricted to admin users only
Mock wallet addresses used for Fireblocks integration placeholder (as documented)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_dashboard_api.py - Created new test file for dashboard APIs
seed_data_creation: Test investment opportunities and public wallets created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard system fully tested. All 6 dashboard pages working (Overview, Wallets, Transactions, Investments, ROI, Transparency). Admin endpoints tested. Membership system with approval flow tested. Fireblocks wallet addresses are MOCKED as expected.

dashboard_overview.details: Loads for approved users, shows pending message for non-approved users

wallets_page.details: Shows 4 wallets (BTC, ETH, USDT, USDC) with mock addresses

transactions_page.details: Loads with filters (type, currency), shows empty state correctly

investments_page.details: Shows opportunities with ROI, duration, pool progress. My Investments tab works

roi_page.details: Shows summary cards, investment status, ROI comparison

transparency_page.details: Shows reserves total, public wallet addresses, audit reports tab

admin_public_wallets.details: Admin can add public wallets for transparency

non_approved_user_flow.details: Non-approved users see 'Account Pending Approval' message with what's next steps

mocked_apis.Fireblocks: Wallet generation is mocked - addresses are placeholder strings like 'mock_btc_xxxx'
